body: {"engine_id":"sigil-forge","result":{"charging_suggestions":[{"description":"Place the sigil somewhere it will be seen regularly but not consciously focused on. The symbol works on the subconscious over time.","name":"Passive Display"},{"description":"Use physical exertion (dancing, exercise, breath work) to reach a peak state. At the moment of exhaustion or release, focus briefly on the sigil then let go.","name":"Physical Gnosis"}],"generated_image":null,"guidance":{"next_steps":["Gather your materials (paper, pen, or digital canvas)","Follow the Word Elimination Method steps above","Allow intuition to guide the final form","Choose a charging method that resonates","Release attachment to outcome"],"note":"This engine provides the process for sigil creation. The actual visual sigil must be created by you — this personal investment is essential to the magic."},"image_gen_available":true,"intention":"clarity in the work","method":{"description":"The classic chaos magick technique. Write your intention as a statement, remove all vowels and duplicate consonants, then arrange the remaining letters into a symbol.","id":"word-elimination","name":"Word Elimination Method","steps":["Write your intention as a present-tense statement of desire (e.g., \"I am confident and calm\")","Remove all vowels from the statement","Remove all duplicate consonants, keeping only the first occurrence of each","Take the remaining consonants and begin sketching them together","Let the letters flow, overlap, rotate, and merge into a single unified symbol","Refine until the original letters are no longer recognizable as letters","The resulting abstract symbol is your sigil"]},"processing":{"letter_count":9,"original":"clarity in the work","remaining_letters":"CLRTYNHWK","type":"word_elimination"},"seed":2146670505,"svg_preview":{"status":"absent"}},"witness_prompt":"What do you notice as you condense your intention into CLRTYNHWK?","consciousness_level":1,"metadata":{"calculation_time_ms":0.0,"backend":"typescript","precision_achieved":"exact","cached":false,"timestamp":"2026-07-20T19:11:29.700138401Z","engine_version":"3.1.0"},"envelope_version":"1"}
